text.tspan: Handler-specific feedback is collapsed and the objective path does not advance
[completed, inactive, null, or out of range]

text.style: text-anchor: middle; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;

svg.text: try higher-priority handlers in source order
return false and emit no completion signal
complete objective step and read progress when multi-step
refresh step tracker and remain on current objective
repair systems, grant training, update route, oxygen, and hazards
apply scene, HUD, and eligible audio consequences
mark slice complete and persist meta payout
save result and success writes user://saves/world.json

text.style: text-anchor: middle; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
